titles.title: I See the Word Made Flesh / Can't You See

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I see the Word made flesh again In these last days, God and man forever to stay What a glorious revelation, Just to know and understand, That Christ came down And united with man.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: CAN’T you see why I’m so happy, I’ve accepted the Word of the Lord, The Revealed Word that was spoken, By the Prophet of Malachi.
